commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: See the Apostles on all occasions exhorting, not merely accepting men, nor courting them, but, speaking unto them, it says, they persuaded them to continue in the grace of God. But when the Jews, etc.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Do you observe the eagerness, how great it is? They followed them, it says. Why did they not baptize them immediately? It was not the proper time: there was need to persuade them in order to their steadfast abiding therein. And the next sabbath day came almost the whole city together to hear the word of God.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
